productDisplayName: Clarks Men Hang Spring Leather Black Formal Shoes
description: Perfect for your daily formal wear, the Hang Spring leather shoe from clarks comes with a durable composition sole and heel that are engineered with cushioned cells that make it absolutely comfortable, especially for high in-step wearers.UpperFull grain leather upper for absolute durability, breathability, comfort and styleFour-eyelet derby lacing system to suit high in-step wearersFabric inner lining and footbed for absolute comfort and abrasion-free liningSmart mudguard style with stitch detailing and seamed vampHas a generous G-width fittingMidsolePU midsole for lightweight, flexible comfortCushioned footbed with Cushion Cell technology for all-day comfortOutsoleDurable rubber outsole with a textured forefoot and flex grooves for absolute grip, traction and flexibilityHorse shoe-shaped texture on the raised heel for enhanced grip, ergonomic comfort and styleShoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustBrush using a branded leather conditioner to restore shoe shineDo not store in direct sunlight
